name: DNS Server Error Failed Loading the ServerLevelPluginDLL
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: DNS Server Error Failed Loading the ServerLevelPluginDLL
SIGMA Description: Detects a DNS server error in which a specified plugin DLL (in registry) could not be loaded

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID" IN('150', '770', '771') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY DNS Server Error Failed Loading the ServerLevelPluginDLL on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID" IN('150', '770', '771') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: DNS Server Error Failed Loading the ServerLevelPluginDLL

Event description: Converted from SIGMA Rule. Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Event Name
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
